hero.name: Thilina Narampanawa
hero.bio: Software Engineer specializing in full-stack web development with experience in Laravel, PHP, React.js, and Next.js. Skilled in frontend & backend development, API integration, UI/UX implementation, deployment, and hosting management, focused on building scalable and user-centric web applications.

bio_paragraphs: Software Engineer with a Computer Science background and hands-on experience in full-stack web development. I specialize in building scalable, high-performance web applications using Laravel, PHP, React.js, and Next.js.

I have experience across frontend and backend development, API integration, database design, UI/UX implementation, deployment, and hosting management, including configuring and maintaining applications in production environments. I focus on writing clean, maintainable code and delivering efficient, user-centric solutions.
Passionate about continuous learning and problem-solving, I thrive in collaborative environments where I can contribute to real-world projects and grow as a software engineer.
about.location: No 60, Sirimalwaththa, Gunnapana, Kandy, Sri Lanka

experience.title: Associate Software Engineer
experience.company: Avia Group Pvt Ltd, Sri Lanka
bullets: Leading the full implementation of JobDaddy V3 platform including frontend, APIs, and advanced feature development initiatives.
Implementing and expanding the CBBS Certificate System with scalable workflows and improved system modules.
Developing the Lenama stock management system with enhanced UI components and optimized backend integrations.
Maintaining and improving official company websites through UI updates, performance optimization, and bug fixes.
Managing hosting environments including DNS, SSL, email configurations, and production deployments across systems.

experience.title: Software Engineer Intern
experience.company: Avia Group Pvt Ltd, Sri Lanka
bullets: Redesigned and improved front-end components of the JobDaddy V2 platform enhancing usability and responsiveness.
Developed and tested the JobDaddy V2 revenue model validating multiple business scenarios for financial accuracy.
Built and deployed the Lenama.lk website with full UI/UX improvements and backend integrations.
Implemented and customized CBBS Moodle-based LMS with enhanced configurations and functional improvements.
Developed the CBBS student registration system with improved user experience and structured data handling.

experience.title: Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Built and maintained responsive websites using WordPress, Laravel, Bootstrap, and Tailwind CSS frameworks.
Designed intuitive user interfaces focusing on accessibility, responsiveness, and improved engagement metrics.
Managed website hosting and updates through cPanel ensuring consistent uptime and optimized performance.
Utilized GitHub for version control enabling collaborative development and structured code management.

achievements: Upcoming Photographer of the Year – Kingswood College
Successfully completed Visharad Examination – Bathkande University, India
activities: Treasurer – Student Activity Club (APIIT Sri Lanka)
Head of Media – Interact Club (Kingswood College)

projects.title: IoT Smart Traffic Management System
projects.description: Developed a smart traffic management system with Arduino, using IR sensors for vehicle counting and RFID for emergency vehicle detection. Included a web-based dashboard for real-time monitoring and control.

projects.title: Remote Working Wellbeing Platform
projects.description: Investigated the effects of remote working on IT professionals' social wellbeing. Proposed a technological platform for stress relief, time management, and support systems.

projects.title: Vehicle Health & Safety IoT Detection
projects.description: Created an IoT-based system to monitor vehicle health and safety, featuring sensors to detect issues and provide navigation to service centers.

projects.title: Camera Store E-commerce System
projects.description: Developed a dynamic e-commerce website for a camera store using PHP and integrated APIs for payment processing and inventory management.

projects.title: Wildlife Conservation Management
projects.description: Created a management system for wildlife conservation using Java and NetBeans, tracking animal populations, poaching incidents, and conservation activities.

projects.title: Math Skill Assessment Program
projects.description: Developed a Python-based program to assess and improve mathematical skills with various quizzes and exercises, providing immediate feedback.

projects.title: Pet Shop Webstore (WordPress)
projects.description: Built an online store for a pet shop using WordPress, featuring product listings, shopping cart functionality, payment gateway integration, and support for vouchers.

projects.title: Pet Shop Webstore (Vue.js)
projects.description: Developed a modern online store for a pet shop using Vue.js. The webstore features dynamic product listings, seamless payment gateway integration, and a responsive user experience.
